title: Mizuno x Fresh Animations
description: A Recource pack that makes Mizuno Craft compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
![Mizuno Fresh Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e76f28faa470635270d2ea0d81e81b5a620738d4_0.webp)

A Resource pack that makes Mizuno Craft compatible with Fresh Animations ![Mizuno Fresh Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd39bbd6570befdb0ea744738973897757123e5d.png)

Fabric:

> Requires [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) > Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

Optifine:

>Video Settings > Quality | >Custom Entity Models : ON | >Random Entities : ON (optional)| >Emissive Textures : ON (optional)
**All of my Mizuno's addons** - [Mizuno Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizuno-better-leaves) - [Unofficial Mizuno's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unofficial-mizunos) - [Mizuno Connected Texture](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizuno-connected-texture) - [Mizuno x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizuno-x-fresh-animations) - [Mizuno's Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-dark-mode) - [Mizuno's Connected Glass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-connected-glass) - [Mizuno Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizuno-eating-animation) - [Mizuno's Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-better-grass) - [Mizuno Copper Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizuno-copper-tools) - [Mizuno's Allay Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-allay-variants) - [Mizuno's Chicken Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-chicken-variants) - [Mizuno's Chicken Variants x FA](https://modrinth.com/project/mizunos-chicken-variants-x-fa) - [Mizuno's Fox Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-fox-variants) - [Mizuno's Cow Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-cow-variants) - [Mizuno's Cow Variants x FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-cow-variants-x-fa) - [Mizuno's Pig Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-pig-variants) - [Mizuno's Pig Variants x FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-pig-variants-x-fa) - [Mizuno's x Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-farmers-delight) - [Mizuno's x Storage Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-storage-delight) - [Mizuno's x Crate Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-crate-delight) - [Mizuno's x Frights Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-frights-delight) - [Mizuno's x Display Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-display-delight) - [Mizuno's x Brewin' And Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-brewin-and-chewin) - [Mizuno's x Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-rustic-delight) - [Mizuno's x Ube's Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-ubes-delight) - [Mizuno's x Vegan Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-vegan-delight) - [Mizuno's x Comforts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-comforts) - [Mizuno's x Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-handcrafted) - [Mizuno's x Letsdo Farm and Charm](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-letsdo-farm-and-charm) - [Mizuno's x Letsdo Furniture](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-letsdo-furniture) - [Mizuno's x Letsdo Bakery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-letsdo-bakery) - [Mizuno's x Letsdo Vinery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-letsdo-vinery]) - [Mizuno's x Reinforced Chest & Barrels](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mizunos-x-reinforced-chest-barrels)
